title: LibraryCard
description: A Queens Public Library card and the application to obtain one — the resident's identity for borrowing, holds, digital lending, and computer use. NET-NEW (alternative write surface): applying for or renewing a card is a login-walled workflow with no owned public API; QPL also offers a $50/year digital-only card available to anyone. This schema serves both the read surface (a card's status) and the LibraryCardApplication write surface (apply for a card).

cardNumber.description: Barcode / card number. Omit on application; returned on the issued card.

status.description: Card lifecycle status. Set by QPL, not the applicant.

cardType.description: Kind of card being applied for or held.

address.description: Residential address (required for a Full card; Digital cards are available to anyone).
